name: [TEMPLATE] [content_gen_plugin] Content Generation — DataForSEO SERP → grounded brief → notify

nodes.name: Spend Read
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: SERP
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Spend Increment

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_window_start: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), p_channel: "dataforseo", p_sender_id: "dataforseo-daily", p_count: 1, p_spend_usd: (Number($json.__spend_delta) || 0) }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Brief

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ tenant: $json.__tenant, target_keyword: $json.__keyword, cluster_label: $json.__cluster, brief_id: $json.__brief_id, recommended_title: ($json.__brief || {}).recommended_title, recommended_meta: ($json.__brief || {}).recommended_meta, outline: ($json.__brief || {}).outline, entities: ($json.__brief || {}).entities, target_intent: ($json.__brief || {}).target_intent, word_count_target: ($json.__brief || {}).word_count_target, internal_links: ($json.__brief || {}).internal_links, grounding: ($json.__grounding || {}), status: (($json.__brief || {}).status || "draft"), run_date: $json.__run_date }]) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]
